stores.name: 11 deployed HTML pages (index, cv, contact, projects/{dicee,maat,scopecam,budget-triage,flux,llm-gateway}, experience/index, research/index)
stores.retention: unbounded (git-tracked; URL stability protected per AGENTS.md:111)
read_authority: Claude Code / Cursor IDE during operator session
write_authority: operator only (via Claude Code subject to permissions matrix, Cursor IDE, or direct git commit)
stores.invalidation_trigger: none; pages persist; on edit, vite rebuild on next mise run build / CI
stores.deletion_or_reset_path: git revert (only legitimate path; URL stability constraint at AGENTS.md:111)

stores.name: assets/jeffrey.css (single stylesheet — the design-system store)
read_authority: every deployed HTML page via <link rel=stylesheet>
write_authority: operator only (enforced by AGENTS.md:94 + css.mdc:9 single-source rule)
stores.invalidation_trigger: content-hash filename on build invalidates CDN cache automatically
stores.lifecycle: persistent; the CSS file is the design-token store (14 custom properties at :root)

citations.evidence: Keep all styles in assets/jeffrey.css (single CSS file)

stores.name: assets/menu.js (mobile-nav runtime JS — only runtime JS)
read_authority: every deployed HTML page via <script src>

citations.evidence: Mobile nav toggle + active link state
Minimal JS: only assets/menu.js for mobile nav — ask before adding any script

stores.name: assets/icons/*.svg (favicon + project icons; 4 files)
read_authority: the 2 project pages using each icon
stores.lifecycle: persistent; maat_feather_16.svg is the all-pages favicon (AAF-VGH-001 vocabulary overweighting)

citations.evidence: 4 SVG files: maat_feather, maat_feather_16, scopecam_color, scopecam_favicon

stores.name: vite.config.js (the 11-page registry)
stores.lifecycle: persistent; the 11-entry input map is architectural ground truth for 'what counts as a deployed page'

citations.evidence: Ask first: changes to vite.config.js build configuration

stores.name: experiments/ (sandbox content; git-tracked; CI+build-excluded)
read_authority: no deployed page links here except via hand-promoted braid SVG
write_authority: operator ('safe to prototype freely' per html.mdc:39-41)
stores.lifecycle: persistent but isolated; hand-promotion to portfolio-pages is the only 'publish' mechanism
sub_notes: experiments/themes/academic.css is the misplaced theme referenced by THEMES.md (AAF-VGH-012); part of S-06 as sandbox artifact

citations.evidence: Pages under experiments/ excluded from CI; safe to prototype freely

stores.name: .claude/settings.json (project-scoped Claude Code permissions + PostToolUse hook)
read_authority: Claude Code CLI at session start (project-scoped)
stores.lifecycle: persistent; governance-class authoritative store per Phase 2 §2.3
stores.sensitivity: low (declares paths and tool patterns; no secrets)

stores.name: .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored operator overrides; 125 bytes)
read_authority: Claude Code CLI at session start
stores.deletion_or_reset_path: operator deletes locally; AUDITOR HAS NO VISIBILITY (gitignored; out of scope per Phase 0 §3)
stores.lifecycle: persistent in operator's copy; never committed
stores.sensitivity: possibly higher than S-07 (may contain operator-specific allowlists or local overrides)

citations.evidence: Phase 0 §4.1 reports file exists with 125 bytes; gitignored

stores.name: 8 governance markdown files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, DEV_GUIDE.md, THEMES.md, README.md, 3 SKILL.md, 3 .cursor/rules/*.mdc)
read_authority: external agents (Claude Code, Cursor IDE) at session start
stores.deletion_or_reset_path: git revert (with operator-declared canonical-precedence at CLAUDE.md:3 → AGENTS.md)
stores.lifecycle: persistent; AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md precedence in-repo; DEV_GUIDE.md drift unmanaged

constituent_files.role: Claude Code shim with precedence statement
HTML authoring rules (glob: *.html, projects/*.html, experience/*.html, research/*.html)

citations.evidence: Full file contents inventoried as contracts

stores.name: CNAME (custom apex domain pointer)
read_authority: GitHub Pages CDN on each deploy
stores.deletion_or_reset_path: git revert (would cause GH Pages to revert to <account>.github.io URL)
stores.lifecycle: persistent; coupled to operator-controlled registrar DNS (out-of-repo)

classification_decision.reasoning: CNAME is a policy-config file whose content is a directive for an external consumer (GitHub Pages CDN). The §8.6 enum has no 'build-source-provenance' class — that is a Phase 4 contract flag (build-provenance-position-missing), not a Phase 5 store class. Rejected 'operator-rules-memory' (CNAME encodes a binding configuration for an external system, not operator preferences for an agent). Rejected 'authoritative-durable' (CNAME is a pointer, not the artifact). Chose 'prompt-policy-config' to capture 'configuration that drives behavior at a boundary'. The associated authority concern (operator-DNS as undocumented secondary credential) is recorded in Phase 4 §2.12 as a contract flag.

stores.name: dist/ (vite build artifact)
stores.retention: per-build (deleted by mise run clean; written fresh by every vite build)
write_authority: vite during mise run build / CI E-07
stores.deletion_or_reset_path: mise run clean (rm -rf dist node_modules); agent writes denied at .claude/settings.json:22,24
stores.lifecycle: ephemeral by design; rebuilt each CI run

stores.name: node_modules/ (npm dependency cache)
stores.retention: until mise run clean or npm ci re-installs
write_authority: npm (npm install, npm ci); agent writes denied at .claude/settings.json:21,23
stores.invalidation_trigger: package.json / package-lock.json change → npm ci rebuilds
stores.lifecycle: derived from package-lock.json; deterministic for any given lockfile

stores.name: ../new-direction-2026/career-transition-ready/ (sibling repo content source; external pointer)
stores.retention: unbounded in the sibling repo (out-of-repo state)
read_authority: operator; manual hand-promotion via /sync-check in sibling
write_authority: operator (in the sibling repo, not here)
stores.invalidation_trigger: when sibling source changes, destination in this repo becomes stale until manually re-promoted
stores.lifecycle: external; lifecycle managed in sibling repo
stores.non_classification_reason: Recorded explicitly to honor 'do not skip retrieval corpora' spec boundary. It is not a retrieval corpus; it is a manual content-source pointer. Cross-repo phase-4 contract row C-19 carries the producer/consumer details.

cname_classification.reasoning_summary: Pointer for external consumer (GH Pages CDN); not memory of operator preferences and not the artifact itself. §8.6 has no 'build-source-provenance' class — that is a Phase 4 contract flag.

readme_classification.reasoning_summary: Public-facing policy-and-summary document with license declaration. Stale-content is a Phase 4 flag, not a Phase 5 classification issue.

authority_crossings_recorded_for_phase_6.crossing: Operator → Claude Code session reads governance + permissions matrix
Claude Code agent → filesystem write subject to permissions matrix
PostToolUse hook → filesystem write on every Write/Edit (biome --write)
GH Actions deploy job → GH Pages CDN with id-token:write + pages:write
